description_long: This stereo sound system features a tall, elegant cabinet with a combination of wood and metallic finishes. The front panel showcases three prominent circular speaker drivers arranged vertically, with a smaller tweeter at the top and two larger woofers below, all set into a textured wood surface. The sides and top are encased in a smooth, light gray material that contrasts with the rich brown wood. Subtle turquoise accents highlight the edges, adding a modern touch to the design. The rear panel is mostly wood, with a small cluster of connection ports near the bottom. The overall build suggests a high-end, floor-standing speaker suitable for premium audio environments.
description: A tall, floor-standing stereo sound system with a wood-textured front, three visible speaker drivers, and smooth gray side panels accented with turquoise highlights.
description_view_0: Front view showing three circular speaker drivers and a tweeter set in a wood-textured panel, framed by gray and turquoise accents.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the smooth, curved gray panel and the depth of the cabinet, with a glimpse of the speaker contours.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous wood-textured surface with a small set of connection ports near the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with the gray panel and the curvature of the cabinet visible.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles have a textured, woven wood pattern with no visible mesh or perforations, giving a decorative and natural appearance.
